key_models.mrp.bom: Bill of Materials. Fields: product_tmpl_id, product_id, bom_line_ids, operation_ids, byproduct_ids, type (normal/phantom/subcontracting), routing_id, version, company_id.
key_models.mrp.bom.line: BOM component line. Fields: product_id, product_qty, product_uom_id, operation_id, bom_product_template_attribute_value_ids.
key_models.mrp.routing: Routing header attached to a BOM. Fields: operation_ids, active.
key_models.mrp.operation: Manufacturing operation step. Fields: name, workcenter_id, time_mode, time_cycle_manual, sequence, bom_id (through relation).
key_models.mrp.workcenter: Production resource. Fields: name, code, resource_calendar_id, time_efficiency, capacity, oee_target, costs_hour.
key_models.mrp.production: Manufacturing Order. Fields: product_id, bom_id, routing_id, move_raw_ids, move_finished_ids, workorder_ids, qty_producing, state, reservation_state.
key_models.mrp.workorder: Enterprise work order. Fields: name, workcenter_id, operation_id, production_id, state, duration_expected, duration, employee_ids.
key_models.stock.move: Raw material and finished goods moves linked to MO. Fields: raw_material_production_id, production_id, move_orig_ids, move_dest_ids.
key_models.stock.warehouse.orderpoint: Reordering rule / orderpoint for MRP. Fields: product_id, location_id, qty_min, qty_max, qty_multiple.
key_models.mrp.unbuild: Unbuild order to disassemble finished goods into components. Fields: product_id, bom_id, product_qty, location_id.

key_files.mrp_workorder/models/mrp_workorder.py: Work order execution and shop floor

crons.mrp_scheduler: MRP scheduler (daily or on demand). Model: procurement.group, method: run_scheduler
crons.mrp_workorder_cron: Work order state transitions and auto-completeness (enterprise). Model: mrp.workorder

security_groups.mrp.group_mrp_user: Create and process MOs, read BOMs and routings
security_groups.mrp.group_mrp_manager: Full configuration of BOMs, routings, work centers, and manufacturing settings
security_groups.mrp.group_mrp_routings: Access to routings and operations (must be combined with user/manager)
